summary_one_line: A valid SFNT font with parseable magic and a 'loca' table tag so glyf->get_extents resolves a glyph and returns true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Multi-byte font/table magic literals at the input head (e.g. the 'loca' FOURCC table tag at offset 0x0c-0x0f and an SFNT version/magic at 0x00-0x03) that the parser compares verbatim before glyf->get_extents can read glyph outlines.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The vpc winner-resolving seed carries 'loca' literally at 0x0c-0x0f (6c 6f 63 61) and 'typ1' at 0x00-0x03, exact byte runs that satisfy the equality comparisons gating the table parse, and its ancestor chain shows an I2S-floor dash row.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds carry no I2S stage, so they never substitute a logged comparison operand into the input; at offset 0x0c the loser bytes are scattered (47(G), 00, 01, 2c) rather than the 'loca' tag, so the table comparison fails and glyf returns no extents.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer, finds the bytes matching one operand of the table-tag comparison, and substitutes the expected 'loca'/magic operand at that offset; value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace so it cannot land the multi-byte literal.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same concentrated magic/table-tag literals at offsets 0x00-0x0f, reached via a Hamming/prefix-distance gradient over the multi-byte comparison rather than by direct substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: vpc adds the CMP_MAP gradient: a near-match input that gets the table-tag comparison closer than any seen pair adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved, ratcheting toward the 'loca'/magic literal that unlocks glyf->get_extents.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: plain cmplog has no CMP_MAP bucket feedback, so partial-prefix progress on the multi-byte comparison earns no coverage credit and is discarded; cmplog resolved only 1/10 trials versus vpc's 10/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records a matching-prefix-length bucket per comparison PC, rewarding inputs that approach the table-tag literal byte-by-byte; combined with I2S in vpc this gives a gradient cmplog alone lacks.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid font header where the table-tag/magic token runs ('true', 'loca', 'ttcf') are preserved as generalised structural units while surrounding bytes vary.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: grimoire winner seeds repeatedly carry 'true' at 0x00-0x03 (74 72 75 65) plus 'loca' and a 'ttcf' TrueType-collection tag, consistent with GeneralizationStage gapping the variable bytes and Grimoire mutators splicing the preserved token runs to keep the parse path valid.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has no GeneralizationStage or Grimoire structural mutators, so it cannot abstract the magic/tag tokens into reusable structural units and reassemble a valid header; it resolved only 1/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders and the Grimoire structural mutators recombine these generalised token/gap structures, letting it rebuild a header that keeps the 'loca'/magic literals intact past the glyf gate.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the glyf->get_extents call whose true side is globally blocked.
vpc beats value_profile decisively with the I2S delta (10/10 vs 0/10).
vpc beats cmplog decisively with the value_profile delta (10/10 vs 1/10).
grimoire beats cmplog decisively with the grimoire_structural delta (9/10 vs 1/10).
The vpc winner seed carries the 'loca' table tag and a 'typ1' header literal at the input head.
W bytes are concentrated on the 'loca' tag at offset 0x0c-0x0f while L bytes are scattered.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's CMP_MAP rewards inputs whose comparison operands get closer to matching, preserving them as corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog lacks the CMP_MAP bucket feedback that value_profile and vpc add.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket)

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with gaps and structural mutators recombine them.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`GeneralizationStage`
replaces concrete byte runs in a corpus entry with `<GAP>` placeholders

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire winner seeds carry the 'true' literal at the input head.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5440 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed d862f87dd0cadddf` and observed exactly 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 12 (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6) of the 13-level chain, confirming I2S contribution under the current logging-bug build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness that gates glyf->get_extents on the 'loca'/magic table-tag comparison where value_profile_cmplog and grimoire fail to resolve the branch above cmplog/value_profile rates, i.e. no decisive divergence appears at the multi-byte literal gate.

weakest_evidence_point: The grimoire_structural attribution rests on inferring GeneralizationStage behavior from preserved 'true'/'loca'/'ttcf' token runs in the seeds rather than from any direct generalization-stage trace in the prompt.
